hero.headline:
30 Years of Bringing Relaxation
Home
hero.subheadline: From hot tubs and swim spas to pools, saunas, and game rooms, Elko Spas has been the Grand Strand's trusted source for backyard fun since 1995. Visit our showroom or let our award-winning team bring the relaxation to you.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Your One-Stop Shop for<br class="hidden md:block"> Backyard Living
services.subtitle: Whether you want a hot tub to melt away the stress, a pool for summer fun, or a game room for family nights, Elko Spas has you covered with expert sales, installation, and service.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Swim Spas
cards.description: Premium hot tubs and swim spas from HotSpring and other top brands. We handle sales, delivery, installation, and ongoing water care so you just soak and relax.

cards.title: Inground & Above-Ground Pools
cards.description: Complete pool solutions from design to installation. Our service division handles repairs, maintenance, and water testing to keep your pool swim-ready all season.

cards.title: Billiards & Game Rooms
cards.description: Pool tables, shuffleboard, foosball, and game room furniture with expert design. Includes delivery, setup, felt replacement, and table maintenance.

cards.title: Saunas & Wellness
cards.description: Create your personal wellness retreat at home with premium saunas. We help you choose, install, and maintain the perfect sauna for your space.

cards.title: Service & Repair
cards.description: Factory-trained technicians handle hot tub repair, pool maintenance, and game table servicing. Prompt, professional support when you need it most.

cards.title: Water Care & Testing
cards.description: Professional water testing and a full line of care products to keep your hot tub or pool clean, balanced, and safe for the whole family.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Stop by our fully-loaded Myrtle Beach showroom. Our friendly, knowledgeable staff will help you explore options with zero pressure and honest advice.

steps.title: We Design & Deliver
steps.description: Our factory-trained technicians handle every detail from design to delivery and installation. We make sure everything is set up right the first time.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy
steps.description: Start enjoying your new hot tub, pool, game room, or sauna right away. Our service team is always here for maintenance, repairs, and water care.

about.label: Why Grand Strand Families Choose Us
about.headline: Not Just a Dealership — Your Backyard Partners Since 1995
about.description: For over 30 years, Elko Spas, Billiards & Pools has been helping Myrtle Beach families create the backyard of their dreams. As a multiple-time AQUA 100 award winner and recognized top-10 dealership in North America, we combine the personal touch of a local family business with the expertise and selection you deserve. Our team of 12 treats every customer like a neighbor.

features.title: Factory-Trained Technicians
features.description: Every technician on our team is factory-trained and certified. From installation to repair, your investment is in expert hands.

features.title: No-Pressure Showroom Experience
features.description: Our knowledgeable staff is here to educate and guide, never to push. Take your time, ask questions, and find exactly what fits your family.

features.title: Trade-In & Financing Options
features.description: We offer trade-in programs and flexible financing to make your dream backyard affordable. Upgrading has never been easier.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Real Value.
pricing.subtitle: From starter hot tubs to full backyard transformations, we offer competitive pricing with financing options to fit every budget.

guarantee.headline: Our "Relax With Confidence" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with your purchase or service experience, we'll make it right. That's been our promise for over 30 years and the reason 719+ families have given us 5-star reviews. Your satisfaction is not negotiable — it's guaranteed.

faqs.question: What brands of hot tubs do you carry?
faqs.answer: We are an authorized HotSpring dealer and carry several premium hot tub and swim spa brands. Visit our showroom to see the full selection, test the water, and find the perfect fit for your home and budget.

faqs.question: Do you offer delivery and installation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our factory-trained technicians handle every delivery and installation. We take care of all the heavy lifting so your hot tub, pool, or game table is set up perfectly from day one.

faqs.question: Do you service hot tubs and pools you didn't sell?
faqs.answer: Yes, our service division works on most major brands. Whether you bought from us or not, our trained technicians can diagnose and repair your hot tub, pool, or game table.

faqs.question: What financing options are available?
faqs.answer: We offer multiple financing programs to fit a range of budgets. Ask our showroom staff about current promotions, monthly payment options, and our trade-in program for existing equipment.

faqs.question: How do I maintain my hot tub water?
faqs.answer: We offer free professional water testing at our showroom and carry a full line of water care products and starter kits. Our staff will walk you through a simple maintenance routine tailored to your specific hot tub.

testimonials.name: Anne K.
testimonials.text: The salt spa I bought from Elko is the best I ever owned. The service they give you is outstanding!

testimonials.name: Katlyn Carroll
testimonials.text: We bought a hot tub and Trease was amazing with helping us from start to finish. Knowledgeable, patient, and truly cares about getting you the right fit.

testimonials.name: Edward Kuzniasz
testimonials.text: Rick showed up on time. He did a great job on my hot tub. He took his time, found the leak and fixed it. Professional and thorough.

contact.headline:
Ready to Create Your
Dream Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Visit our Myrtle Beach showroom or request a free consultation. No pressure, no gimmicks — just honest advice from a team that has been doing this for over 30 years.
